title: feat: hourly pollen refills for spore/seed via Cloudflare Cron
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Hourly pollen drops
gist.blurb: Spore and Seed tiers now get their pollen refilled every single hour instead of waiting for a daily reset. We've also added smart balance protections so your free usage never accidentally eats into your paid credits.
gist.summary: Implemented hourly pollen refills for Spore and Seed tiers via Cloudflare Cron, alongside new balance protections that prevent free tier overages from spilling into paid credits.
gist.impact: Free tier users will now see their pollen balance recover gradually every hour, and paid credits are strictly protected from free tier overages.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot tracking hourly pollen refills. A glowing hourglass or clock motif representing the hourly cron job, with lime green pollen drops.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny worker's apron, watching glowing lime green (#ecf874) pollen drops fall from a retro hourglass into a glass jar. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head sits nearby, happily tracking the hourly progress on its screen. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
